nasb.text: For such is the will of God that by doing right you may silence the ignorance of foolish men.

esv.text: For this is the will of God, that by doing good you should put to silence the ignorance of foolish people.

cnv.text: 因為這是　神的旨意，要藉著你們的善行，塞住糊塗無知人的口。

ccb.text: 因为上帝的旨意是要你们行善，使那些愚昧无知的人哑口无言。

csbs.text: 因为神的旨意就是要你们藉着行善，堵住那些愚妄人无知的口。
